verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the cares of this life get you down, And it seems that there is no peace of mind to be found, When I want to just run and hide; I can always get away in Christ.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's a heavenly place in Christ, Above the world's confusion and strife, When I kneel in prayer I get carried away To a heavenly place in Christ.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the world around you is crowding near, And you find it hard to turn your back on sin, God has made a way for you to escape, Just run into that heavenly place.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Nations are breaking and this whole world is shaking, And there's no sure place to stand, But the Bride is waiting for a glorious taking When we're caught up by His almighty hand.
